zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise de Tibetot於1270年出生在英國素福爾可內特萊斯亞德時，她的父親Robert de Tibetot42歲，母親Eva de Chaworth21歲。她與John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke在英國哈普爾波斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1345年2月18日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可可斯斯享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise de Tibetot于1270年出生在英国素福爾可內特萊斯亞德时，她的父亲Robert de Tibetot42岁，母亲Eva de Chaworth21岁。她与John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke在英国哈普爾波斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1345年2月18日在英国英格兰諾福爾可可斯斯享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可。

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise de Tibetot was born in 1270, in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, her father, Robert de Tibetot, was 42 and her mother, Eva de Chaworth, was 21. She married John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke in Portchester, Hampshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 18 February 1345, in Costessey, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise de Tibetot est née en 1270, à Nettlestead, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Tibetot, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Eva de Chaworth, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke à Portchester, Hampshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 18 février 1345, à Costessey, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise de Tibetot 1270 in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Tibetot 42 und ihre Mutter Eva de Chaworth 21. Sie hat in Portchester, Hampshire, England John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 18. Februar 1345 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Costessey, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Tibetot è nata il nel 1270 nel Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Robert de Tibetot, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Eva de Chaworth, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke nel Portchester, Hampshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 18 febbraio 1345, nel Costessey, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise de Tibetotが1270年にイギリススフォルクネットレステアドで生まれた時，父Robert de Tibetotは42歳，母Eva de Chaworthは21歳であった。イギリスハンプシュアイアポルトチェスターでJohn de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1345年2月18日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクコステセイで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise de Tibetot(이)가 1270년 영국 수폴크 네틀레스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Tibetot(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eva de Chaworth(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 영국 함프실르 포트체스터에서 John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1345년 2월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 코스츠시에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Tibetot nasceu em 1270, em Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Tibetot, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Eva de Chaworth, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke em Portchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 18 de fevereiro de 1345, em Costessey, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise de Tibetot родилась в 1270 г. в местности неттлестид, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Tibetot было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Eva de Chaworth, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke в местности порчестир, хампшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 18 февраля 1345 г. в местности костесси, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hawise de Tibetot nació en 1270, en Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Tibetot, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Eva de Chaworth, tenía 21 años. Se casó con John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke en Portchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 18 de febrero de 1345, en Costessey, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
